# CyberCloudInfra

> Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) delivering secure Azure-first cloud modernization, cybersecurity, disaster recovery, and IT infrastructure solutions for government and enterprise missions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of CyberCloudInfra's SDVOSB cloud, cybersecurity, and IT modernization services.
- [About](/about): Company background, mission, and veteran-owned leadership.
- [Capabilities](/capabilities): Core competencies across cloud, cybersecurity, infrastructure, and government solutions.
- [Certifications](/certifications): SDVOSB, SBA, SAM, and related federal registrations.
- [Industries](/industries): Sectors served, including federal, defense, healthcare, financial services, and education.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles and how to join the team.
- [Blog](/blog): Insights on cloud migration, DevSecOps, and Zero Trust security.
- [Contact](/contact): Ways to reach the team and start a conversation.
